programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Janken Boy Is Coming!
programme.desc: Kira’s father, Yoshihiro, begins searching for Stand users who would help protect his son from his pursuers. Meanwhile, Rohan is taking photos at the train station when he is suddenly challenged to a game of rock-paper-scissors.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: I'm an Alien
programme.desc: While on their way to school, Josuke and Okuyasu find a young man lying unconscious in the middle of what appears to be a crop circle. When they try to take a closer look, the man suddenly wakes up and starts claiming he’s an alien from outer space.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Highway Go Go, Part 1
programme.desc: Rohan is convinced that Josuke is cheating in their game of Cee-lo when all the dice rolls in his opponent’s favor. Feeling insulted, Rohan stabs his own finger and swear he’ll find out how Josuke is cheating in their next round.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Highway Go Go, Part 2
programme.desc: Rohan sacrifices himself to save Josuke from a remote-controlled Stand that sucks nutrients out of its victims. Moved by Rohan’s act of bravery, Josuke races through town to find and defeat the Stand’s user before it can kill Rohan.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Cats Love Yoshikage Kira
programme.desc: Shinobu tells her husband, Kosaku, that she saw a stray cat in their basement with a hole in its throat. When Kosaku goes down to take a look, he finds the cat already dead, The next morning, a strange plant sprouts from the spot where the cat was buried.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 1
programme.desc: Yoshihiro Kira spots Kosaku Kawajiri and instantly recognizes that it’s actually his son, Yoshikage. Meanwhile, Josuke, Okuyasu, and Mikitaka find a strange man living in an abandoned electrical tower.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke enters the electrical tower again to save Mikitaka and defeat Toyohiro Kanedaichi. Meanwhile, Rohan receives a visit from a first-class architect named Masazo Kinoto, who’s come to estimate the repair costs to his burnt house.

programme.title: Death Note: Execution
programme.desc: After fifty days of confinement the killings continue, and Misa and Light are released.

programme.title: Death Note: Ally
programme.desc: Though L is still suspicious, Light and Misa, their memories of being Kira wiped clean, return to headquarters….

programme.title: Death Note: Matsuda
programme.desc: Matsuda, the task force member assigned to watch Misa, is eager to distinguish himself.

programme.title: Death Note: Makeshift
programme.desc: L's team discovers that the Yotsuba Group meet in secret to discuss the elimination of individuals who are troublesome to their company….

programme.title: Death Note: Performance
programme.desc: The Yotsuba Group hires Eraldo Coil to uncover L's identity.

programme.title: Death Note: Guidance
programme.desc: Misa succeeds in narrowing down the Kira suspects in the Yotsuba Group to one: Higuchi.

programme.title: Death Note: Frenzy
programme.desc: Higuchi of the Yotsuba Group attempts to kill Matsuda of the task force, and is surprised when he doesn't die after 40 seconds.

programme.title: Death Note: Revival
programme.desc: Higuchi is captured and tells the investigators about the Death Note.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A high school girl gets shot with a silencer from a white BMW. Her big sister contracts Ryou.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A scientist dies: his beautiful daughter helped him develop a deadly bacteria. Arms dealers are after her.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A boxer is shot in a park by a rival. His widow, a doctor with cancer, contracts Ryou.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Beautiful girls disappear in shops, including Ryou's partner's little sister: Makimura Kaori.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kotatsu, a painter, sees a dream in which he becomes successful by controlling an army of ogres drawn with ink that has a sacred jewel shard in it.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Naraku appears before Sesshomaru and lends him an arm with a sacred jewel shard embedded in it.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sesshomaru wields the Tetsusaiga with his borrowed arm against Inuyasha, who fights back with his scabbard.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome has her sacred jewel shards taken away from her and is returned to the present day, unable to return to feudal Japan.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome returns to the shrine in the middle of her date with Hojo. She senses the presence of the Shikon Jewel shards and returns to feudal Japan.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo, who was brought back to life, is living as a priestess.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo paralyzes Kagome. Inuyasha appears before her. Kikyo has been gathering the souls of dead girls.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango, a demon slayer, is invited to Hitomi Castle along with her father, the leader of the demon slayers, and her younger brother, Kohaku.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On their last leg, Anita Manning and James Lewis begin in Dorchester, then travel to Portsmouth and Fareham before their final auction in London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new trip for Mark Stacey and Will Axon, traveling through East Sussex, from Hastings to an auction battle in Lewes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day two for Mark Stacey and Will Axon. Beginning in Bilsington, they travel across Kent before ending up at an auction in Sandwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in the coastal town of Deal in Kent, experts Mark Stacey and Will Axon head west to battle it out at their auction in Chiswick, London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Will Axon and Mark Stacey begin in the Crystal Palace before heading to Piccadilly in central London to visit the home of The Kennel Club. The boys then head on to their auction in Southend-on-Sea.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Mark Stacey and Will Axon begin the final leg in Gosfield, Essex, through Finchingfield and St Albans, Hertfordshire, and end at auction in Ruislip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a brand-new trip for veteran Philip Serrell and new boy Tom Scott. They begin in St Buryan then wind their way up towards Wareham in Dorset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Tom Scott start day two in Lostwithiel, then visit the ports of Plymouth and Morwellham quay before an auction in Cornwall.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Tom Scott start their day near Dartmoor at Ashburton. They'll be travelling around Devon before arriving at auction in Chudleigh.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Tom Scott begin at Exeter in the county of Devon, then travel through Dorchester before making for an auction at Upwey in Dorset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Tom Scott start the day in Southampton, then head east through Fareham, Portsmouth and Southsea, to auction at Wareham in Dorset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and David Harper begin in the town of Windermere, weaving through West Burton and Middleham to auction in East Boldon in Tyne and Wear.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and David Harper start out in Sunderland before making their way through Durham to auction in the North Yorkshire town of Northallerton.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and David Harper begin day three in Hexham, Northumberland, before heading across the border for an auction in Dumfries.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Toronto, where they examine an American soda siphon sought after by country store collectors, a porcupine quill box, a valuable Newlyn School painting, and fine English oak furniture.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: From Clitheroe in Lancashire, Michael and the experts unearth a mix of treasures. Among them, a Victorian multi-purpose pen knife, a miniature theatre, and a Japanese lacquered chest.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts visit Winston Churchill's Kent home, where they see a painting by Graham Sutherland and a Russian submachine gun owned by a vicar.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents the antiques show from Sherborne in Dorset. Finds include an inflatable paper globe from 1830 and work by the illustrator of Winnie the Pooh.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: In the second visit to Sherborne School in Dorset, the experts find an original monk's bench, letters from Lewis Carroll, an 18th-century satinwood cabinet of great value, a cigarette case, and part of the airframe of the R100 airship.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: This episode of Antiques Roadshow comes from County Sutherland in the Scottish Highlands. Michael is making the journey by train because the venue, Dunrobin Castle, has its very own railway station.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel returns to Dunrobin in the Highlands for a look inside the Castle with Lars Tharp. There's a selection of unseen treasures from other Roadshows including fine jewelry, silver, and porcelain, and even a collection of Star Wars memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: At Renishaw Hall in Derbyshire discoveries include a collection of swords, a homing pigeon clock, a patchwork quilt, and a valuable painting of a lion.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: At Renishaw Hall in Derbyshire, the finds include a portrait by Stanley Spencer and Sir Reresby Sitwell takes a look at what is purported to be Robin Hood's bow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents in the gardens of Sudeley Castle, Gloucestershire, where the experts look over a fine regulator clock, a sapphire pendant, Winchcombe pottery, and a pouch traded with a dentist by Cligatac Indians in exchange for pulling teeth.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Stephanie cope with an odd assembly of UFO enthusiasts camping on the beach in anticipation of an extraterrestrial visitation. Smugglers threaten Summer to recover diamonds they hid inside a surfboard Slade gave her.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An escaped psychopath takes Summer and Stephanie hostage in a lifeguard tower, necessitating a thrilling subterranean rescue attempt by Mitch and Matt.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch finds himself falling for an Italian actress who is being stalked by ruthless robbers. Meanwhile, CJ and Stephanie help Guido pretend to be a lifeguard in order to impress his visiting mother.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When he risks his life to save three teenagers, Mitch fractures his spine and is paralyzed. Hobie, Stephanie, and Sophie, his physical therapist, rally to repair his shattered life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Paralyzed during a heroic rescue, Mitch undergoes a vigorous rehabilitation regimen. Meanwhile, Jason, a ten-year-old paraplegic, is pursued by a hitman trying to keep him from testifying against gangsters.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch coaches Matt in an amateur kickboxing tournament, but the competition turns deadly when an enemy from Mitch's past gets him into the ring. Meanwhile, CJ, seduced by a fashion photographer, considers leaving Baywatch for a modeling career.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch contends with an unorthodox, risk-taking Australian lifeguard, and rekindles his love affair with a beautiful journalist, Kaye Morgan.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch's ex-wife flies in for a weekend visit. She introduces her new fiancé Ken and informs Mitch she is taking Hobie back to Ohio with her. When Ken's private jet crashes in the ocean on takeoff, the Baywatch team have to rescue them!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A dramatic plane crash finds Hobie and his mother trapped in the rapidly flooding fuselage beneath the sea while Mitch and the Baywatch lifeguards mount a massive rescue effort to save the trapped passengers and crew.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: David Rickels vs. Adam Piccolotti From Bellator 189

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Mohegan Sun Arena as two giants collide in the Bellator cage when all American Matt Mitrione takes on Russian knock-out artist Sergei Kharitonov in the Heavyweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the Mohegan Sun Arena with a Quarter Final bout in the Welterweight World Gran Prix as undefeated Michael Page takes on Paul Daley. In the Co-Main Event, Mirko Cro Cop makes his Bellator MMA debut against Roy Nelson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Emmanuel Sanchez returns to the cage after his hard-fought run toward the title vs a featherweight rematch Georgi Karakhanyan.

programme.title: Bellator 219: Awad vs Girtz
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Temecula, California with a lightweight clash between Brandon Girtz and Saad Awad that promises fireworks. Also, former welterweight champ Andrey Koreshkov, and former featherweight champ Daniel Straus makes his long-awaited return.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Joes to kick off the Welterweight Grand Prix as Rory MacDonald defeats his Welterweight belt against the veteran Jon Fitch. In the co-main event, Flyweight Champ Ilima Lei Macfarlane faces off against Veta Arteaga.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Douglas Lima takes on Michael 'Venom' Page in the Semi-Final round of the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Main Event, Featherweight Champion Patricio Pitbull moves up to challenge Michael Chandler for the Lightweight World Title.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Madison Square Garden as Welterweight Champ Rory MacDonald defends his belt against Neiman Gracie in the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Co-Main Event MMA legends Lyoto Machida and Chael Sonnen square off in the Bellator cage.

programme.title: Bellator 224: Budd vs Rubin
programme.desc: The summer heats up when Bellator MMA Featherweight World Champion Julia Budd returns to the cage off 10 straight wins. Can her challenger the undefeated Olga “Big Bad” Rubin ice out Julia’s hot streak? Also, rising star Juliana Velasquez in action.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Donna has extreme hatred for her daughter-in-law, Jen, and it's coming between her relationship with her son, Brad. Jen & Brad say they're so terrified of Donna, they changed the locks and sleep with a gun. Can Dr. Phil calm these feuding in-laws?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Divorced in 2007, Doug & Beverly are against each other, citing drug use, abuse, & parental alienation. They admit their son, 15, & daughter, 9, are stuck in the middle. Can these exes stop pointing the finger and come together for the sake of the kids?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee & Lee insist their little granddaughter is not safe in the care of her parents because they are severe alcoholics. Chris & Jessica admit to alcoholism yet insist they are great parents. Dr. Phil shows shocking footage of what home cameras captured.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: With Nancy Grace, children's rights attorney Paul Mones & criminologist Dr. Denise Boots, Dr. Phil delves into the headlines: a starved & beaten teen escaping his torturers, an 8-year-old boy arrested for killing his father & two reporters found dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: There have been no answers to the whereabouts of Summer Wells, 5, missing since 2021. Parents Don & Candus say it backfired by requesting the public's help. In this exclusive first national TV interview, Dr. Phil digs deeper into the story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's interview with death row inmate Rodney Reed continues. Reed's attorney, Bryce Benjet tells what he thinks happened to Stacey. Retired NYPD detective Kevin Gannon & criminologist Dr. Lee Gilbertson say they know who killed Stacey & how.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tammy & Mark say they haven't spoken to their son, Cory, in a year as his wife, Katrina, is literally-- a witch! Katrina, a self-proclaimed "witch," says her inlaw's judge. Cory denies his wife controls him & he's against the poor treatment of his wife.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with the fiancée of former football star Aaron Hernandez. Shayanna Jenkins- Hernandez speaks on Hernandez's suicide & responds to rumors about his sexuality & his alleged intimate relationship with a fellow inmate. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his mission to end the silence on domestic violence. More than 25 percent of battered women remain in a relationship with their abuser. Sonya fears that she is one of those women who stay. Hear her story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2014, former live-in nanny Diane Stretton made headlines when she refused to move out of Marcella Bracamonte's home. The women come face-to-face on Dr. Phil's stage. Who's the victim in this mother vs. nanny feud?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Blake, 26, is a college graduate and on the dean's list with a 3.5 GPA. He has thrown it away to sit around and smoke pot in the rent-free house his mom supplied. He has aspirations, like stripping off his shirt to show off his self-professed buff body.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Crystal accuses her ex-boyfriend, Anthony, of sexually assaulting their 3-year-old daughter. Crystal says she has proof confirming Anthony as the monster she says he is. Anthony says Crystal is “crazy and a liar.” Can Dr. Phil expose the truth? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bullies roam schools & playground--also work, social circles & under your own roof! Temica RoShawn, 26, admits to physically & verbally abusing overweight & people with disabilities. Comedian Kirk Fox goes undercover as a wheelchair user to test bias's.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you imagine getting an inheritance, you might assume all your financial problems would be solved. But can the money be more trouble than it's worth?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: It's tonic time in Beverly Hills. Granny's made a batch of tonic and sends a sample to their new neighbor, the Countess Maria. She loves it and throws a party to celebrate.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is having a ground-breaking ceremony for a new bank building and the Clampetts think they need to pitch in to help build it. Meanwhile, Mr. Drysdale's associates try to get stock market tips off of Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts get a big food package from home and Mr. Drysdale's two associates, Mr. Lucus and Mr. Pendleton think that the crawdads have something to do with the development of military reconnaissance technology.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale has Jed buy a Beverly Hills dress store for an investment and the Clampetts show up to help "the poor widow and her starving girls".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts try to turn their newly acquired Beverly Hills dress boutique, The House of Renee, into a country store, The House of Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed sends Elly to the Beverly Hills dress boutique he used to own (now the House of Maurice) to learn how to be a lady, where Mrs. Drysdale mistakes her for royalty.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An old friend from back in the hills is now an Elvis like singing idol. The Clampetts misunderstand the situation and decide to help Johnny get on his feet.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está perpleja al encontrar el denominador común entre las víctimas masculinas en Montana, lo que hace difícil el perfil del sospechoso. JJ debe enfrentar sus sentimientos respecto a la trágica muerte de su hermana.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Baez confides in Danny and asks for his help in proving her innocence after she finds a corpse in her front yard. Also, Erin struggles to find a peaceful solution when she receives harsh case notes from her boss.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank asks Erin to liaise between him and NY Governor Mendez regarding policy reform he privately backs, but can't publicly support, because it goes against police rank and file.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank takes matters into his own hands to save Gormley's career when the officer is accused of using excessive force after decades-old complaints against him become public knowledge.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Business becomes personal for Frank and his 1 Police Plaza team when Baker is assaulted on the street, as well as for Erin, when she asks her ex-husband, Jack Boyle (Peter Hermann), to represent a defendant she's prosecuting.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan cuando un niño de 6 años informa al NCIS de que su padre ha sido secuestrado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando los cuerpos de dos asesinos son entregados al NCIS desde el extranjero, Tony y Ziva asumen sus identidades encubiertas y participan en una cita sexy en un hotel de lujo con el fin de encontrar a su objetivo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una parte de un cuerpo femenino en Quantico, el equipo del NCIS investiga y se sorprende al descubrir que todas las pruebas forenses apuntan a Tony como principal sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando McGee mata a un hombre durante una misión, el equipo del NCIS interviene para respaldarle cuando descubren que el hombre era un agente de policía encubierto.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un destacado abogado desaparece en Boston, la UAC descubre secretos en su pasado que podrían señalar las razones de su desaparición.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga crímenes aleatorios en el norte de Virginia y busca a un sospechoso del conflicto, que tiene un deseo incontrolable de matar, él también está lleno de remordimiento.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al UAC a Salt Lake City, Utah, para investigar un triple asesinato, la búsqueda de una conexión entre las víctimas podría llevarlos hasta un fugitivo que podría estar relacionado con el sospechoso.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin brings in his toughest group of women yet to compete in Drag Race, Bagged, and Blowout. Only one will earn the right to take on his Skullbuster and a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: The last group of elite male athletes comes to Steve Austin's ranch in search of the $10,000 prize. After battling through Trench Warfare, Pain Train and Barreled, only one will have a shot at the Skullbuster.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: It's the final episode and Steve Austin has saved his best for last. Who will go home with the $10,000 grand prize? Find out on the Broken Skull Challenge.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Twenty- four wild Southerners descend on a picturesque lakehouse in Georgia with $100,000 reasons to win big. But, only one team will split the payday.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Bullets fly as the rednecks shoot their way through another difficult challenge. As a new power couple emerges in the game, another team's new romance is put in jeopardy as they face elimination in The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rednecks must face their fears as the challenge takes them to new heights. A newly formed team must learn how to work together both on and off the playing field.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: An action-packed challenge sends the teams flying and lands one player in the hospital. Margaret continues to alienate the rest of the house while Cowboy and Cody almost come to blows.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The team bonds are tested when the Rednecks must rely on each other's strength and endurance to win the challenge. A new romance develops and causes controversy in the house.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A late-night prank angers the house and puts huge targets on the prankster's backs. The rednecks have a hard time keeping down what Steve is dishing up at the challenge and then a grudge match is settled at The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The pressures of the game are getting to some of the contestants and a wild night out causes tempers to flare. This week's challenge proves to be too much for two of the players to handle.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Tensions boil over as a relationship continues to create friction in the house. The rednecks must prove they have brains as well as brawn as the latest challenge puts them to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Down to the final 4 teams, the remaining rednecks plot to take out whoever stands in their way of making it to the end. At the challenge, the players put it all on the line as they overcome any obstacles standing in their way.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Having survived the competition so far, the day they've all been waiting for arrives as the final three teams battle it out in an epic race of strength, intelligence, and endurance.

programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.desc: Después de que ocurre un tiroteo que involucra a un niño justo en el medio de Koreatown, ninguno de los testigos hablará con el equipo de CSI que investiga el caso.

programme.title: El Hermano Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina abandona el digno oficio de limosnero, pero no por ello va a cometer la locura de trabajar. Va a dar a una orden de Frailes que se dedican a hacer la caridad y se enfrenta a los problemas de los Frailes y los de todos a su alrededor.

programme.title: El Investigador Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina confunde al vicepresidente de una empresa con un ladrón. Sus amigos los luchadores Tinieblas y Superzan acuden en su ayuda y evitan un asalto. Capulina creyéndose el héroe decide poner una agencia de investigadores.

programme.title: El Karateca Azteca
programme.desc: Capulina ayuda a un arqueólogo alemán y a su guapa hija, Nadia a visitar ruinas arqueológicas. Una banda de contrabandistas de piezas arqueológicas atrapa al padre de Nadia. Capulina combate a los malhechores con sus artes marciales.

programme.title: El Metiche
programme.desc: Capulina es un metiche que causa peores problemas a la gente que los que ellos tienen antes de que Capulina trata de ayudarlos.

programme.title: Toña machetes
programme.desc: La determinación de Lorena por darle un giro a su vida y escapar de un entorno decadente, hará que encuentre en la actuación un camino que le ayudará a descubrir sus talentos y habilidades.

programme.title: La Barraca
programme.desc: This classic is recognized as one of Mexico's Top 25 movies of all time! Director, Gavaldón, adapted the 1895 novel by Vicente Blasco Ibánez (Blood and Sand) for this movie.

programme.title: Los Cuatro Juanes
programme.desc: Los Cuatro famosos Juanes: Juan Colorado, Juan Sin Miedo, Juan Pistolas y Juan Charrasqueado pasan peligrosas aventuras para llevar un importante cargamento de armas y municiones desde Veracruz hasta un pueblo sitiado por las fuerzas del gobierno.

programme.title: Desde mi cielo
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a la adolescente de 14 años Susie Salmon, ella deja atrás una vida inconclusa. Ahora, desde su lugar en un extraño pero hermoso mundo intermedio, ella debe ayudar a su padre a atrapar a su asesino.

programme.title: Están todos bien
programme.desc: Cuando los hijos de Frank Goode (Robert DeNiro) cancelan una reunión familiar, el viudo emprende un viaje por el país para reconectarse con ellos. Esperando compartir las alegrías de sus vidas felices, sus visitas revelan una imagen no muy perfecta.

programme.title: ¡Madre!
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence y Javier Bardem ofrecen actuaciones inolvidables en ¡Madre!, el elogiado trabajo de Darren Aronofsky. ¡Experimenta el suspenso psicológico visualmente deslumbrante que dejará tu corazón latiendo y te volará la cabeza!

programme.title: Luna de porcelana
programme.desc: Un apasionado thriller de suspenso sobre un detective veterano en una pequeña ciudad de Florida, cuyo romance clandestino con una viuda joven y rica teje una telaraña de engaño, traición y asesinato.

programme.title: Desde Mexico con amor
programme.desc: Un entrenador fracasado toma a un joven boxeador autodestructivo (Kuno Becker) bajo su ala.

programme.title: Mente indomable
programme.desc: El exitoso drama ganador del Óscar, que lanzó las carreras de Matt Damon y Ben Affleck, cuenta la historia de un genio de clase obrera obstinado a quien no le va bien en la vida, hasta que conoce a un profesor de psicología cercano (Robin Williams).

programme.title: 40 días y 40 noches
programme.desc: Después de una ruptura amorosa y una serie de conquistas insatisfactorias, un hombre hace una promesa de no tener relaciones sexuales durante 40 días y 40 noches. Josh Hartnett y Shannyn Sossamon protagonizan esta sátira.

programme.title: Pobres divas
programme.desc: Nora y Mary solo conocen la buena vida en Beverly Hills, pero la fortuna de papá se esfuma. Una tía las toma bajo su protección, pero ella vive del "otro lado de la ciudad". Ríete mientras las princesas se embarcan en la mayor aventura de sus vidas.

programme.title: Como si fuera cierto
programme.desc: David Abbott, un arquitecto solitario, encuentra un increíble apartamento en San Francisco, solo para descubrir que está embrujado por el espíritu del inquilino anterior, Elizabeth Masterson, una doctora superdotada que está en coma.

programme.title: La mujer de mi hermano
programme.desc: Zoe e Ignacio llevan 10 años casados y la pasión se ha enfriado. Una Zoe sexualmente frustrada se siente físicamente atraída por su cuñado. Las cosas se complican aún más después de que ella queda embarazada y descubre que su esposo puede ser gay.

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: Cómo entrenar a tu esposo
programme.desc: Una terapeuta matrimonial intenta arreglar su propio matrimonio centrándose en cómo cambiar a su marido.

programme.title: Treintona, soltera y fantástica
programme.desc: Una mujer en sus treinta y tantos años se descubre a sí misma a través de la vida, el amor y el corazón roto.

programme.title: La cacería
programme.desc: El rastreador más famoso del FBI busca a un villano que asesina personas para ser el blanco de una cacería.

programme.title: El Pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: El Robo más Grande de la Historia
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, Dwayne Johnson interpreta a un detective de la policía de Nueva York que intenta resolver el mayor robo de dinero de la historia de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico solo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narcotráfico.

programme.title: Nacido para correr
programme.desc: Born To Race es la historia de Danny Krueger, un joven corredor callejero rebelde que está a punto de meterse en problemas. Después de sufrir un accidente en una carrera callejera ilegal, lo envían a un pequeño pueblo a vivir con su padre.

programme.title: El gran jefe
programme.desc: Bruce Lee se enfrenta a un elemento criminal y clandestino después de que miembros de su familia comienzan a desaparecer. Ahora debe romper su voto de ninguna violencia para enfrentarse al aterrador "Gran Jefe.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: El crimen del Padre Amaro
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: Septiembre, un llanto en silencio
programme.desc: En medio de un ataque terrorista perpetrado por la guerrilla un 5 de septiembre de 1980, Teresa queda sorda a los tres meses de edad y fallece su madre. Junto a su padre, enfrentarán la soledad, el dolor de crecer, el miedo y el amor incondicional.

programme.title: El cuento de las comadrejas
programme.desc: Una actriz de la era dorada del cine argentino comparte una mansión en decadencia con tres hombres: su esposo, un guionista y un director con los que solía trabajar. Pero la llegada de dos jóvenes y la posible venta de la mansión lo cambian todo.

programme.title: Una navidad real
programme.desc: Un ejecutivo de publicidad trabajador se enamora de un consultor que es un príncipe disfrazado.

programme.title: Mi amor en navidad
programme.desc: Lucas, un famoso cantante cuyo mayor éxito ha sido "Mi Amor en Navidad", decide tomarse un descanso, volviendo a su pueblo natal para pasar las fiestas. Allí se reencuentra con Elisa, su primer amor y la inspiración de su éxito navideño.

programme.title: Una navidad para recordar
programme.desc: Sebastián, quien odia la Navidad y enfrenta su primer año sin sus hijos después de un divorcio, decide pasar la temporada con su madre Ángela, quien padece de Alzheimer.

programme.title: Una estrella de Navidad
programme.desc: Una joven que cree que puede hacer milagros pone en marcha un plan para salvar a su pueblo de un desarrollador.

programme.title: Un pueblo navideño
programme.desc: Para salvar su reputación, Piper Jensen, un genio en relaciones públicas y dueña de su propia agencia de relaciones públicas, acepta trabajar para el dueño de un Pueblo de Santa en dificultades, ahí descubrirá el amor y cuán mágica es la Navidad.

programme.title: Todo Gira Alrededor de la Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer debe elegir entre un trabajo de Nochebuena o unas vacaciones con su novio.

programme.title: Christmas at Rosemont (LAS)
programme.desc: Atrapada en una tormenta de nieve cinco días antes de Navidad, Lisa, de 23 años de edad, y su nuevo amigo Brad, un snowboarder profesional, se refugian en The Rosemont.

programme.title: Una estrella de Navidad

programme.title: Un pueblo navideño

programme.title: Todo Gira Alrededor de la Navidad

programme.title: Cementerio de mascotas

programme.title: La Dama De Negro

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, más de una docena de niños en Seattle, Washington, luchaban por sus vidas. Cada uno de ellos había contraído una enfermedad grave desconocida. Después de que uno murió, los investigadores sabían que el reloj estaba corriendo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vida cambia después de 20 años de haber transcurrido un crimen sin resolver, y lo mismo ocurre con la medicina forense. Hoy en día, un microscopio de alto poder y el perfil de ADN, revelan una pista que nadie había visto antes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Quién fue el delincuente sexual que asesinó a dos muchachos adolescentes en Nebraska? La clave para detenerlo sería la composición única de la cuerda basura que usó para amarrar a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La pista ardiente
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie anda suelto en Washington, DC. Cada uno de los incendios se inició con el mismo tipo de dispositivo incendiario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En algún momento durante una fiesta de Navidad en el vecindario, Melissa Brannen, de cinco años, desapareció. Los investigadores recurrieron a la ciencia forense para ayudarlos a ver lo que se perdieron los testigos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es apuñalada más de 100 veces. El asesino deja atrás el ADN, pero los investigadores deben jugar al gato y al ratón para obtener el ADN de un sospechoso que coincida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ataque biológico
programme.desc: El Ataque bio terrorista de Rajneeshee en 1984: los investigadores descubren un complot para derrocar al gobierno después de que una cepa única de salmonela enfermara a la gente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Rhoda Nathan fue encontrada asesinada en una habitación de un hotel en Cincinnati.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nicole Rae Walker, de 6 años de edad, murió en un choque donde el culpable se dio a la fuga en su Vecindario de Ft. Lauderdale.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un embrague de testigos
programme.desc: Dos testigos presenciales pueden tener la llave de la muerte de un miembro de una pandilla de motociclistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un brutal ataque a dos niños cerca de un estanque se basa en pruebas extraídas de las aguas turbias. Fue el primer caso en el que se utilizó evidencia de Diatomea (algas) para ubicar a un sospechoso en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Paintball
programme.desc: En 1962, la gente de la pequeña ciudad de Hanford, California, perdió la sensación de paz cuando una de las vecinas, Marlene Miller, de 15 años, fue asesinada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, la agente de bienes raíces de Texas Sarah Anne Walker fue brutalmente asesinada en una casa modelo. Semanas después, se presentó un testigo que pudo haber visto al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Batallón de pruebas
programme.desc: Una madre de dos niños pequeños fue encontrada muerta en su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre la muerte de un veterano de la Segunda Guerra Mundial se detuvo por completo cuando el sospechoso principal tenía una cortada sólida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.desc: Undisputed female lightweight title bout. From Oct. 29, 2022 at the OVO Wembley Arena in London.

programme.title: Boxing

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall looks back at the most awesome experiments over the series and chooses his highlights.

programme.title: Land of Giants: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.title: The Giant Claw: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: An Ice Warrior invasion fleet is on its way to the Moon. Back on Earth, the Doctor devises a plan to destroy the Martian fungus.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The TARDIS arrives in no man’s land during World War I. Rescued from the Germans, the travellers are put on trial by the British General Smythe who is not all he seems.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: Finding evidence of alien technology in Smythe’s office, the Doctor, Jamie, and Zoe make their escape in Lady Jennifer’s ambulance, but Smythe gives orders to have them killed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor and Zoe penetrate the Aliens' HQ from where the war games are controlled. Carstairs is reconditioned and exposes the Doctor and Zoe as German spies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog develops an aggression problem after moving to a new area; a big dog does not let people near her owner; a beagle sniffs continually.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog becomes aggressive when he sees other dogs; a Newfoundland does not eat; a dog runs out of the house whenever the door opens.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Kike echa a Marcela del TacoExpress. A Griselda se le cae del bolsillo el último boleto de lotería que compró. El ticket queda en el suelo de la habitación de Antonio, que se va de la casa. Leonardo pide un rescate para los perros de Teresa Cristina.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Patricia busca a Antonio en la posada para decirle adiós y él la besa. Kikito encuentra el boleto de lotería y se lo da a Kike. Griselda sufre por haber echado a Antonio de la casa pero encuentra consuelo en Reinaldo, que le da un fuerte abrazo.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: A Ty lo llevan de emergencia al hospital y su carrera política peligra. Marisa visita al senador y constata que Sara y Cristóbal están juntos, pero Carmen le pide a Marisa que luche por él. Tito cae en las provocaciones de Bruno.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Bruno se alista para su cuarto frente de batalla y ahora se encuentra con Tito para tratar de seducirlo. Lalo exige recompensa por su trabajo. Víctor sigue con su plan de conquistar a Leticia. El senador está obsesionado con Marisa.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: La salud del senador se complica, Sara lo visita y se lleva una gran sorpresa al enterarse de la empatía que hay entre Ty y Marisa. Catalina amenaza a Sara, que busca una tregua de una manera muy particular. Carmen no le deja el camino libre a Sara.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara y Catalina firman un pacto de no agresión. En el hospital, Amelia es señalada por mentir sobre la visita de Marisa, a ella le cuesta creer que la empleada haya llegado tan lejos y más ahora con la petición especial que hace Ty antes de operarse.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia visita a una persona muy especial en la capital, pero el encuentro resulta muy doloroso. Briñón tiene un mal presentimiento justo cuando tratan de llevársela por la fuerza.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia se lleva a sus hijos según lo acordado, pero ella no sabe si ellos pueden afrontar uno de sus miedos. Alicia recibe invitaciones, pero la propuesta de Sebastián la deja pensativa.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián defiende a Alicia e incomoda a su madre con preguntas. Hayde siente miedo por su proyecto secreto, debe escoger entre ceder a las advertencias de Perfecta o cumplir con lo acordado.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia va a la finca con sus hijos, cuando ellos se duermen Sebastián la invita a dar un paseo a solas, no imaginan lo que puede pasar. Hayde le cuenta algo a su hermano y lo desconcierta.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Patricia busca a Antonio en la posada para decirle adiós y él la besa. Kikito encuentra el boleto de lotería y se lo da a Kike. Griselda sufre por haber echado a Antonio de la casa pero encuentra consuelo en Reinaldo, que le da un fuerte abrazo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Beatriz le confiesa a Alba que quiere tener un hijo de Guillermo a través de su esperma donado a la Clínica de Fertilización. Manuel vuelve en sí y le agradece a Celeste por salvarle la vida. Patricia encuentra a su padre abrazando a Griselda.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: En su última noche en el restaurante, Griselda le pide a Reinaldo que no se vean más pero la atracción mutua solo aumenta. Gabriel sorprende a Kike y a Clara besándose en la cocina. Máximo le confiesa a Bárbara que no se está sintiendo bien.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina y Reinaldo harán una fiesta para renovar sus votos y Antonio se la juega por reconquistar a Patricia. Hay gran expectativa por la pelea entre los boxeadores Máximo y Murillo. Juan Pablo finalmente habla con Esther sobre la paternidad.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt one of the contestants will be seated on a platform above the water wearing weighted boots. Laying face down on the floor, contestants' heads are placed in separate medieval looking helmets, filled with snakes and rats.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, each contestant will be standing on a beam that is suspended in the air off the sides of a train box car. In a banquet room, couples will feed each other as much disgusting food as they can.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants in the finals will be riding on the back of an Ultraboat as a helicopter settles in overhead. Male contestant is placed in a bamboo cage filled with large bullfrogs, which is then lowered into a pit.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A rope will be suspended between two helicopters. Contestants will be standing in a tall cage. Contestants must discover a key to a ‘box of worms', which will be transferred onto a scale.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant is locked by their waist to the drivers seat and wrist to the steering wheel. Contestants determine the quantity and variety of Fear Factor Sushi they will have to eat. A six-inch wide beam will be sticking out perpendicular from a roof top.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be seated in a helicopter and hanging directly under the skids. One of the partners will be dangling by their ankles and hanging by their ankle.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: One teammate will start hanging upside-down from a crane bound by their wrists and ankles in the air. Contestants with the highest card will determine who gets what cocktail. Couples will be strung parallel of each other from windows.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on the bottom ledge of plexiglass wall that is suspended over the water from a crane. Newlywed couples will have to tear apart a Fear Factor wedding cake filled with insects.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a beam above the water and must make their way around the structure. Contestant will climb through a plexi-glass tunnel. A struss structure will be wrapped by cargo netting and hung beneath a 212 helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A beam will be hung above another beam. Contestants are to devour the covered trays that conceal six different types of Fear Factor Sausage. Both team members will be seated in separate stunt cars on opposite ends of a track.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite skids of the same helicopter. Contestants are hogtied with duct tape on the floor of a meat locker. Contestants will be lying on their backs in a 72-foot-long trough on the roof of a building.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle was fatally injured in what police believed to be a hit-and-run accident. Tiny clues found at the scene created a picture of the vehicle which struck him and led police to its driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.desc: El primer desafío para los once Chefs restantes: hacer una pizza gourmet. Los ganadores disfrutan de hamburguesas gourmet en Santa Bárbara mientras los perdedores preparan la cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los diez Chefs restantes complazcan a una adolescente exigente que vino a Hell's Kitchen para celebrar su fiesta de cumpleaños.

programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay hace que los nueve Chefs restantes se sometan a una prueba de sabor con los ojos vendados. Los ganadores pueden ir a un spa; los perdedores deben limpiar la habitación.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.desc: 10/17/79: After falling behind 3-1 in the 1979 World Series, the Pirates rallied to come back and take home a championship. Willie Stargell goes 4-for-5 with a home run in Game 7 to lift the Pirates to a 4-1 win over the Orioles.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/21/80: Tug McGraw strikes out Willie Wilson on a 1-2 fastball in Game 6 sealing the Phillies' 4-1 win over the Royals, bringing home the franchise's first-ever World Series Championship.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/20/82: With the championship on the line, Bruce Sutter comes into the game in the 8th inning to blank the Brewers. The Cardinals captured their ninth World Series win in a dramatic Game 7 win at Busch Stadium.
