programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega el boss, es italiano y tiene carácter, comienza regañándolos y los envía a trabajar crudos. Isaac está de cumpleaños y recibe muchos regalos, incluido el de Adela. Elettra come una pizza que la pone cachonda. Una gran alegría llega a Rimini.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Hay tensión en la casa, Adela está de malas con Elettra que no entiende cual es el problema, pero el problema es que ella se está ligando a Isaac adelante e Adela y a este parece no importarle.Victor y Potro se dicen sus verdades.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Karime y Elettra arman un plan para ligarse a Ferre y a Isaac delante de Adela y Eva porque no les gusta su actitud irrespetuosa, estas dos están un poco sorprendidas por lo que pasa y no saben bien como enfrentarlo.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones van a tope para todos menos para Eva que parece no disfrutar lo que está viviendo, ni la llegada de su amigo Pietro logra sacarle el mood negativo a la francesa de fuego. Al mismo tiempo la casa está en shock por un chisme.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los shore llegan a Roma. Hay discusiones por ver quién se queda con quién en el hotel. Potro está molesto porque Karime y Elettra se quedan con Víctor y se roban el cuarto del amor. Toda la belleza romana invadida porn los shores que cantan.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mucha tensión en las mini vacaciones en Roma, Potro parece alejarse definitivamente de Karime y gasta una broma al grupo muy pesada. Danik y Elettra finalmente chocan en una pelea dura que divide a la casa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: El clima enrarecido cambia una vez más con la llegada de Tadeo a la costa adriátrica, es que Ursulo media muy bien entre todos y de a poco se gana al grupo y lo une, además se gana el corazón de Elettra que muere por él.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La familia vive un viaje a Venecia a tope, junto con Tadeo y Paula la nueva integrante de la familia. Por la noche en Venecia, algo pasa en la habitación de las chicas que traerá cola y que nadie puede terminar de confirmar muy bien

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Una verdadera guerra se desata en la casa desde la llegada de Paula.Parece no tener límite. Luego de que el chisme del que habla toda la casa salió a la luz, Paula pelea muy fuerte con Isaac y todo el mundo reacciona empeorando el descontrol.

programme.title: Catfish México

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Samantha tiene sentimientos muy fuertes por un perfil en Facebook desde hace 6 meses, que sabe todo lo que hace. Hay 2 sospechosos principales. Chapu y Badalt crearán una red esperando a que el catfish caiga.

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Hace 3 años Daney hizo una audición para doblar voces en un canal de Youtube, ganó y conoció al amor de su vida; le pidió matrimonio y aceptó pero nunca ha visto su cara. Necesita ayuda urgente.

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Karla ha encontrado perfiles falsos en la red, utilizando sus fotografías, los ha reportado; algunos han desaparecido y en otros aparece bloqueada. Su mayor preocupación es: ¿qué pueden estar haciendo con esos perfiles falsos? Y, ¿quién está detrás?

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for the perfect older brother; Timmy wishes that everything in school were mixed up like a puzzle book.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a scholarship to military school; Timmy's father tries to help him with his homework.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes he were a fish; Timmy wishes for a device that would allow him to change places with anyone.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy must stay with Grandpa Pappy while his parents are out of town; Timmy finds his father's favorite childhood book series.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy, Cosmo and Wanda find themselves trapped in a bedtime story; Timmy wishes that a substitute teacher could be his permanent teacher.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy offers to baby-sit so that Cosmo and Wanda can have a night out; Timmy wishes for indestructible hair.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy goes to the hospital to have his tonsils removed; Timmy wishes to see his favorite baseball team.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy convinces the fairies, anti-fairies and pixies to participate in a competition to see who is best.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: After Timmy wishes for a talking car, he goes on an adventure in Fairy World with Wanda, Poof and "Carsmo"; Timmy convinces Cosmo and Wanda to give him his own magic wand with 10 wishes on it.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a machine that allows him to merge with other items to become half-Timmy and half-something else; when Timmy wishes for a simpler world, everyone is transported to prehistoric times.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Evil princess Mandie plots to marry Mark Chang and become ruler of Yugopotamia; Dark Laser offers Timmy a scholarship to Dark Mouth University in order to turn him into his evil apprentice.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy's parents find Poof and are convinced that he is an alien super baby; Jorgen takes Timmy to a rehabilitation facility to get him to learn to wish less and be more independent.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a special car wash that will make his father's sports car look younger; Wanda is worried that Poof does not interact with other fairy babies.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Vicky gets fired from babysitting Timmy; Timmy wishes for a super girlfriend for the Crimson Chin.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy tries to help Catman find a safer job; Timmy's mother turns their house into a bed and breakfast.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy tries to thwart his parents' plans for his birthday party; Timmy discovers that his mother wants to spend time with him.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that he could be a fly on the wall when he is forbidden from watching a horror film; when Cosmo and Wanda are busy taking care of Poof, Timmy wishes for a temporary fairy to fulfill his wishes.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Poof must stop his anti-fairy from destroying the Fairy World and his loved ones.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: When Timmy's father is too busy to spend time with him, he wishes for more fathers; the Squirrely Scouts and the Cream Puffs race to the top of Mount Doom.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Poof watches too much of a classic but violent cat and mouse cartoon; Crocker is concerned about Timmy's grades; Poof will not take his medicine.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The magic of Fairy World shuts down after Crocker is hypnotized into no longer believing in fairies; when Cosmo is ousted from the house, he becomes Dimmsdale's newest superhero.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Crocker is convinced that Timmy's father is a fairy and sets out to prove it; Timmy meets his grandparents and wishes that they had never come to America.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: After Timmy is rejected from the school band, he wishes that everyone would love his music; Vicky is stricken by Timmy's generosity when he saves her from a horrible accident.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Poof turns everyone into chickens; Timmy steals Cupid's arrows in an attempt to make Trixie fall in love with him.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Cosmo's brother comes to visit; when no one wants to play with Poof, he runs away to a place where he is the center of attention.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy impresses his father's boss when he joins his father at work one day; Timmy becomes magically talented at soccer after accidentally eating Poof.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Foop escapes from prison and convinces Cosmo and Wanda that he is reformed; when Timmy wishes that he were the teacher's pet, Poof grants his wish and turns him into a guinea pig in Mr. Crocker's class.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Wanda switches Timmy's brain with his mother's brain; Crocker decides to start hunting leprechauns instead of fairies.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy es confundido con un bebé problemático. Una partida de póquer en casa de la tía Miriam.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy se preocupa mucho cuando se corta por primera vez ya que lo desconocido lo asusta, pero aprende que los cortes siempre sanan. Los bebés piensan que Carlitos está creciendo luego de que el abuelo Lou encogiera su ropa en el lavarropas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos recibe su primera bicicleta. Los adultos dejan al abuelo en la estación de gasolina.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés juegan a ser personajes del salvaje Oeste. Tommy decide hacer que Carlitos sea más valiente poniéndolo en el lugar de Angélica.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlos y Carlitos deben cuidar a la malvada gata de Angélica, mientras ella y su familia dejan la ciudad. Durante una pijamada, Tommy y Carlitos temen que El Mago de los Sueños venga por ellos, así que le ponen complejas trampas para atraparlo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés hacen un viaje al sótano. Los bebés asisten a una fiesta de cumpleaños en la casa de los McNulty.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi y Hugo van a un crucero romántico por su aniversario. Mientras Carlos trabaja en su árbol genealógico, Carlitos se entera de sus antepasados. Por otro lado, en el crucero, Didi siente muchos mareos y luego descubre que está embarazada.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos adopta un patito como su hermano tras sentirse ignorado por Tommy, quien ahora debe cumplir tareas de hermano mayor. Por otro lado, Firulais está celoso por toda la atención que recibe Dil.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos decide cambiar de imagen tras descubrir que ya no es tan lindo como solía ser. Por otro lado, Angélica les miente a los bebés diciendo que tiene una hermana gemela, con el fin de recibir el doble de golosinas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés tratan de enseñarle cosas a Dil, ya que creen que no es tan listo como ellos. Por otro lado, los bebés quieren competir contra Angélica por un juguete e intentan no dormir una siesta.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy escucha que él debe ser el hombre de la casa mientras Hugo está afuera, viajando. Julio llevará a Hugo a un spa para convertirlo en un hombre nuevo. Tommy se preocupa al pensar que su padre se transformará en alguien diferente.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés imaginan que un automóvil es un submarino, mientras Hugo elige su auto. Carlitos descubre que es zurdo. Angélica le hace creer que es un fenómeno.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo lleva a los bebés a una pastelería, y los bebés deben rescatar a Dil antes de que se convierta en glaseado. Por otro lado, Angélica le dice a Tommy que ser calvo significa que será un bebé para siempre.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés visitan un zoológico interactivo y se convencen de que se convertirán en animales si se quedan allí. Por otro lado, Angélica planea una boda para Lili y Carlitos, pero el matrimonio no es lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El abuelo cuenta la historia de las habichuelas mágicas y los bebés creen que Dil tiene poderes tras comérselas. Los bebés piensan que convirtieron a Dil en una sandía.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Dil recibe juguetes viejos de Tommy. Susie es elegida para ser la bailarina principal de la clase de ballet y Angélica se pone celosa.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Carlitos deciden tomar caminos separados y hacen nuevos amigos en el parque. Carlitos aprende sobre el arte en un museo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés visitan un vivero, imaginan que están en la selva y los persigue un tigre, y tratan de salvar a Dil de una terrible enfermedad. Boris y Minka preparan unas vacaciones en una cabaña.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica les cuenta a los bebés una historia de terror en la que ellos son los protagonistas. Carlitos escribe un reclamo a Reptar después de ver un comercial.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos tiene un auto de pedales y se vuelve popular en el parque. Dil escucha música y Tommy se pregunta si puede imaginar escenas en su cabeza.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Wanda cambia el cerebro de Timmy con el cerebro de su madre; Crocker decide iniciar la caza de duendes en lugar de hadas.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: De vacaciones en Hawái, Timmy desea que sus padres participen en una peligrosa competencia de surfeo. ¿Podrán papá y mamá dejar de surfear antes que los lleve a la destrucción?

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Después de fracasar miserablemente en un programa de juego para los alumnos de 6to grado, papá admite que abandonó la escuela en el quinto grado. Lo siguiente que Timmy se entera es que su papá está en su clase.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea que mamá sea la mejor cocinera del mundo; y luego, los Turner ganan un concurso para ser la primera familia en el espacio - ¿o no?

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy pide prestado el Fake-i-fier de Mark Chang, para poder asistir a la fiesta de disfraces de Trixie; Cosmo debe hacer cumplir las normas cuando a Jorgen le dan los Trick-ups.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá hace naufragar a los Turner y tiene que salvar a la familia antes de que la isla explote. Timmy pide el deseo de tener oscuridad completa para poder dormir en paz un poco.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El padre de Timmy convierte su casa en una granja; el Sr. Crocker intenta exponer a los monstruos en un programa web.

programme.title: Legends of the Hidden Temple

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony visits his wife's homeland and learns what it means to be Sardinian.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony visits some of the oldest and most classic NYC restaurants.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony heads to Mexico with Carlos, who took over Tony's old job.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony decides to relocate for a year to write the great Vietnamese novel.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony becomes enamored with Provencal culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony visits the Philippines and samples some of their rare delicacies.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony visits with food-obsessed individuals.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores the snow-capped mountains of Livingston, Montana.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony visits San Francisco, a city of districts with quirks and flavors.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony samples an unusual cut of warthog meat with Kalahari bushmen.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony's adventure in Seoul, South Korea, includes kimchi and tae kwon do.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: In Sweden, Tony tries to conquer his unresolved ABBA issues.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony leaves his mark on Sao Paolo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Anthony explores the beauty and cuisine of a country once known as Burma.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony takes Los Angeles, where he zeroes in on an area known as Koreatown.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores Colombia from the mountains to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In Quebec, Tony ice fishes and spends time with two brilliant chefs.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Three years later, Elizabeth still carries strong doubts about Manny's intentions with her family and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is Manny innocent?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Callista has been living with a horrible rumor about her estranged father Franco. He has no idea what he has been accused of and wants to prove that he's not a monster. Find out what the rumor is and if they'll ever have a relationship.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jamie has been cheating on her boyfriend with a woman! Then, Steve believes his wife’s been cheating with another man. Next LaToya's here to cause a family feud. She's been cheating with her girlfriend's sister!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Johnny wants his girlfriend Aimee to accept him for who he is. Then, Maya comes on the show to confront her boyfriend Eric about his tendencies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Deuce is here to finally come clean to his wife and tell her that he's been sleeping with their friend. Next Debbie is about to find out that her boyfriend, Chris, is more than just friends with his friend Cory!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Janie was born without hands or feet but has beaten the odds and started a family. Doug admits he no longer loves her and faces off with her estranged, angry parents today!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bev will see her son for the first time in 7 years and find out why he left! Then Joyce suspects that her granddaughter is prostituting out of their home! Later Jenna confesses to her girlfriend, Stephanie, that she's been cheating with her mother!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These denying dads swear there's no way they're the father! These moms need to prove them wrong. The only thing that's missing is the truth! DNA results don't lie, but after the results are read, who will be left looking for more answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Brenda and her man Aaron return after proving that Aaron was a cheater! Now they're here to prove that Aaron didn't father Tammie's baby. Then, Cat will test her boyfriend Tim and his brother Don to find out who her child's father is!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki's boyfriend Tavon is cheating on her. What will they say when they watch him on our hidden cameras? Then, was Naomi's fiancé able to resist our sexy decoy? Plus, is Jeremiah's baby with Robin really his?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tempers flare when Belinda's husband finds out she's cheating, but he thinks it's his fault and asks for forgiveness. Next Twist will reveal a huge secret to his fiancee ... he is really a woman!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jennifer refuses to let her ex-boyfriend, Marcus, go. She says she'll get him back no matter what it takes. Next Eddie left Glinda and their two-year-old son 16 years ago. Today Glinda tells Eddie that she wants him back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Whilst in jail, Scooter asked his dad, Richard, if his wife Keri and their child could move in with him, but he didn't expect Keri and Richard to fall in love!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Es Cortney el padre de los hijos de Brittany? Según su hermana, Brittany fue infiel con su prometido Clifton. Después, Melissa afirma que su ex-marido no es el padre de sus gemelos y que es Sean! ¿Lo confirmarán los resultados del ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Shenik y Shenequa aparecieron en el programa de Maury el año pasado después de una prueba de ADN. ¿Pero ahora Shenik se acuesta con el novio de su hermana? Además, lo único que se interpone son los resultados de la prueba del detector de mentiras.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Danica, una nueva mamá, recibió 5 correos electrónicos diferentes de 5 mujeres asegurando que se acostaron con su novio, Jimmy, en su casa. Entonces, ¿el novio de Renee preferirá su adicción a su familia?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Dashawn y su mamá afirman que lo de Monica fue una aventura de una sola vez y que él no puede ser el padre de su bebé. Entonces, April quiere averiguar quién es el padre de su bebé. Después, ¿Frederick o Jason es el padre del bebé de Marietta?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury está celebrando las fiestas contando cuentos junto a la chimenea. Compartirá las historias de los antiguos invitados que vinieron a hacerse pruebas de paternidad, al detector de mentiras y más. ¡Averigua si estos invitados han sido buenos o malos!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de hacer 5 pruebas de ADN, Rebecca regresa con 2 hombres más para encontrar al padre de su nuevo bebé. Después, Don y su esposa se alegraron al descubrir que su hijo no era el padre del bebé de Jessica, pero ella cree que Don es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Don y Amy contrataron a Jessica para cuidar a su hijo, Steven. Años más tarde, Jessica dice que Steven es el padre de su hijo. Además, Marisol ha hecho 16 pruebas de ADN para encontrar al padre de su hijo. ¿La prueba número 17 será la definitiva?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.desc: Luisana corre a casa de Luis Mario para hacerle saber lo que le dijo Claudia, que la hija que está esperando Rosaura es también su hija. Luis Mario decide ir a hablar con Rosaura a la hacienda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marbella está completamente desesperada ya que acaba de despertar y se da cuenta que ha quedado ciega. Luis Mario, junto a Gabriel y Guillermo, tratan de calmarla.

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: This thrilling, lightning-paced adventure has the indestructible James Bond (Timothy Dalton), armed with his razor-sharp instincts and license to kill, battling diabolical arms merchants and chasing the gorgeous Maryam d'Abo.

programme.title: Licence to Kill
programme.desc: James Bond catapults into his most passionate adventure -- not for country, not for justice, but for personal revenge. Timothy Dalton brings urgency, charm and deadly determination to his role as 007.

programme.title: Goldeneye
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan ignites the screen as James Bond in this explosive, thrill-packed adventure that pits him against a vengeful adversary who controls an awesome space weapon capable of global destruction.

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: The 18th installment of the series pits Bond (Pierce Brosnan) against a powerful media mogul (Jonathan Pryce) and his wife (Teri Hatcher) who has a secret past with Bond.

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: In the 19th film of the franchise, James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) is once again pitted against Valentin Zukovsky (Robbie Coltrane), the Russian mobster from Goldeneye. Judi Dench returns as M and Desmond Llewelyn returns as Q.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Sin tiempo para morir
programme.desc: Una misión de rescate para salvar a un científico secuestrado se complica más de lo previsto, llevando a Bond (Daniel Craig) a enfrentarse a un enigmático villano equipado con tecnología de última generación.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) debe evitar que un peligroso espía ruso gane un juego de póker que vale millones y financia a terroristas globales.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.desc: Roy is up to his usual antics at an auction in the Old Weston neighborhood of Toronto but this time Ursula strikes back. Paul and Bogart are the epitome of the blind leading the blind, while Rick and Cindy's locker is more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul and Bogart concoct an entirely new strategy for an auction in Leaside: to have no strategy at all. Rick and Cindy play doctor, Ursula gets her geek on, and Roy rocks out with Canadian metal icon Robb Reiner.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Ursula hopes her pet chinchilla will bring her luck at an auction in East Gwillimbury, but little Monty has ideas of his own. Rick and Cindy get into watersports, Paul and Bogart make a virtue of chastity, and Roy comes to work in his pajamas.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Two hoarders are living in life threatening conditions. Cynthia has a debilitating auto immune disease and lives in a hoard that could make her illness deadly.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Judy's life is a dangerous one of severe contradictions. She is an extreme germaphobe who spends her entire day engaged in sanitization rituals.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Roxann is a former model who has successfully hidden her hoarding until now. Barbara's extreme hoarding has forced her out of her house.

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.desc: Ethan gets help from Hecate. Evil forces track Vanessa's every move.

programme.title: Penny Dreadful

programme.title: Penny Dreadful

programme.title: Penny Dreadful

programme.title: New Space Adventures
programme.desc: In this episode of New Space Adventures: Mars, we will explore the present day missions on Mars as well as the future missions and plans for the red planet.

programme.title: New Space Adventures

programme.title: New Space Adventures

programme.title: New Space Adventures

programme.title: Disasters in Space: Return to Disaster
programme.desc: Relive the harrowing moments in Launch Control during NASA's second "Return to Flight" test flight after the tragic loss of Space Shuttle Columbia. Watch as NASA engineers discover the frightening truth about the incident and the mistakes that caused it.

programme.title: Disasters in Space: Mars or Bust
programme.desc: Serious injury and death threaten technicians working on the Mars Exploration Rover when a test procedure goes horribly wrong. As the clock ticks toward the critical Mars launch window, NASA scrambles to understand and fix this critical space mistake.

programme.title: Disasters in Space: Space Shuttle Shuffle
programme.desc: Catastrophe beckons when gears controlling a Single Point of Failure Space Shuttle landing system are installed backwards. And despite multiple pressures, a shocking discovery causes NASA to cancel a historic launch.

programme.title: Disasters in Space: The End of Genesis
programme.desc: A spacecraft freefalls from orbit smashing into the ground when its parachute fails to deploy. Can the multi-million dollar science mission be salvaged? And, a wrong turn ruptures a costly Space Shuttle "cold plate!

programme.title: Disasters in Space: Trains, Rockets and Pains
programme.desc: A harrowing space mistake leaves the solid rocket boosters hanging by a thread and places the unsuspecting public in the cross hairs of more than a ton of the most explosive rocket fuel on the planet. And, a training exercise goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Disasters in Space: Columbia
programme.desc: Space Shuttle Columbia stands as one of the worst space disasters in history. Discover why a seemingly insignificant bit of foam came off during launch, puncturing a hole in the the wing - leading to catastrophic failure, loss of vehicle and loss of life.

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers
programme.desc: The Burj Dubai holds the title as the tallest man-made structure ever built, pushing the technological envelope. Near India's capital Delhi, the Qutub Minar reigns supreme for almost a thousand years as the world's tallest brick minaret.

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers: Episode 5
programme.desc: The largest airport terminal in the world in Beijing is an engineering marvel that nonetheless pays strict adherence to the principles of Chinese Feng shui, and marks a new footnote in an age-old tradition of building big.

programme.desc: Val Kilmer, Sam Shepard and Graham Greene star in this murder mystery filled with style and suspense. Kilmer stars as Ray Levoi, a hotshot FBI agent who's thrust into a strange new world when he is sent to solve a murder on an Indian reservation.

programme.desc: A hitman tries to retire, but a beautiful thief may change his plans.

programme.title: World's Greatest

programme.title: Rudy Maxa's World

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers that Nirrti is mutating the inhabitants of an unexplored planet with a machine that rearranges their DNA. Captured in an attempt to stop her, O'Neill must find a way to escape before he and SG-1 are subjected to the same fate.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers three human survivors on an off-world planet who claim to be under attack by hostile aliens. While Carter helps repair the ship's computer, she learns that the survivors are hiding a secret…and things may not be all they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando encuentra a su esposa con las maletas listas, él le deja el camino libre, Gabriela prefiere que se vaya su hija y no Fernando. Juan se angustia porque no conoce la decisión de Norma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena invita a Norma a cenar en la casa de Juan, él tiene miedo de perderla. Franco recibe una oferta de trabajo de Eduvina Trueba, una viuda millonaria que hace lo imposible para seducirlo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela piensa en el cumpleaños de Jimena, cree que es un día amargo para su hija, pero Norma y ella se divierten con Juan y Óscar. Franco se enreda al aceptar ser el secretario de Eduvina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena le cuenta a Norma sus sospechas sobre las intenciones de Óscar y Juan, luego que los escucha hablar de la fortuna Elizondo y encuentra fotos de Libia, se aterran al recordar quién era.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan le pide a Paula que se vaya de la hacienda, pero ella se niega a irse. Esteban provoca a Juan y este reacciona con violencia, ya que no logra controlar sus celos. A Julieta se le intensifica su dolor de cabeza y sigue con su camino lleno de venganzas.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula confiesa su amor a Juan, pero él le pide renunciar al dinero y a Esteban, como una prueba de lealtad. Ella no puede cumplirle, decide empacar y marcharse lejos. Julieta recibe el terrible diagnóstico y lo mantiene en secreto.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar termina por ceder a los sueños de Lupe dándole una tregua, todo por un reclamo de Beatriz. Juan se arrepiente de enamorarse de Paula, mientras que a ella la invade la tristeza. A Julieta no le queda mucho tiempo. Esteban aumenta su ambición.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le ruega a Juan que vuelva con Julieta, porque a su lado sólo sufrirá en medio de sus confusiones y compromisos. Él, furioso, busca a Julieta y le pide que se reconcilien y, aunque ella duda sobre la decisión, finalmente lo hacen oficial.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica no quiere que Alejandro se vaya del pueblo. Él aprovecha la oportunidad para repetirle que la ama. En una misión especial a San Pedro, el comisionado Balmaceda tiene su primer enfrentamiento con Antonia. Ricardo trata su problema de impotencia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia es sacada de su hacienda esposada; Balmaceda es obligado a llevársela cargándola. Verónica le da pistas al comisionado acerca de Guerra. Lucho teme que el mismo policía que lo llevó a prisión descubra todo. David es sorprendido con su novia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro quiere ayudar a David a pedir la mano de Cecilia. Pero antes, quiere saber si está enamorado de ella. Verónica y Lucho están a punto de hacer el amor. Antonia ve desnudo a Balmaseda en su cuarto y sueña que tiene una noche de pasión con él.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le pide a su novio que huya de casa porque Rodrigo ha iniciado un operativo para detenerlo. Irene escucha que su marido ama a Verónica, busca un calmante en el baño de Antonia y encuentra el frasquito del veneno que ella usa con Valentina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena le cuenta a Norma sus sospechas sobre las intenciones de Óscar y Juan, luego que los escucha hablar de la fortuna Elizondo y encuentra fotos de Libia, se aterran al recordar quién era.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia, una de las vendedoras del mercado, le cuenta todo a Jimena acerca de la muerte de Libia. Franco renuncia a su empleo con Eduvina, y ella le arma un escándalo a Rosario en el bar.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are in Manaus, Brazil, where they have big decisions to make when they encounter the first U-turn of the race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Asunción, Paraguay, where they must either stack a pyramid of watermelons or perform a traditional Paraguayan bottle dance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Almaty, Kazakhstan, where they brave the cold weather while perfecting a choreographed fight scene and decorate a yurt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Hyderabad, India, where they must complete double the detours, double the road blocks and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The first ever mega leg in race history continues through Hyderabad, India, where teams compete in double the detours and double the road blocks, and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the first city sprint, the final four teams race through Manila, the capital of the Philippines, where they have no road blocks and no detours.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final three teams travel to New Orleans, where one team is crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While racing through Scotland in February 2020, teams receive shocking and unprecedented news - for the first time in the show's history, THE AMAZING RACE suspends production due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Host Phil Keoghan gathers the teams in Switzerland to restart the Race nearly 20 months after production was suspended for the.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard volunteers to become the Big Brother of a high school boy.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he joins the massive operation to relocate several Big Horns from Tonto National Forest to the Catalina Mountains in an effort to reintroduce the animals back into their native range.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Marsupials
programme.desc: From hairy-nosed wombats and legendary white wallabies to red kangaroos and fierce Tasmanian devils, this Wild Countdown hops along with ten magical moments with marsupials!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack joins the conservationists racing to save incredible species from extinction. Sea Turtles, Giraffe, Painted Dogs, Cheetahs, Whooping Cranes, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an adventure to the Loggerhead Marinelife Center in Juno Beach, Florida where conservationists are working to save endangered sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is in Zambia getting an up-close look at some of the toughest reptiles on the planet – fierce and dangerous Nile Crocodiles! Then he takes a walk on the wild side with white rhino, giraffe, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along on an epic adventure to meet the big cats of Tanzania. These top predators include Lions, Cheetahs, and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into the mystical and mysterious Mashpi cloud forest in Ecuador, where the rainforest meets the Andes Mountains. The forest is buzzing with hundreds of hummingbirds, bats, snakes, and butterflies!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top of the Pach-yderm
programme.desc: Join Jack for a colossal countdown with the mighty pachyderms! From the biggest land mammal in the world, the African elephant, to Borneo’s pygmy elephant, Jungle Jack is counting down his favorite elephant encounters all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets creatures thriving in their tropical island homes, like the Bison of Catalina Island, Flamingos in Curacao, Sea Lions in the Galapagos, along with Bats, Dolphins, and a special island dedicated to Monkeys!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack treks through the pristine Corcovado National Park in search of the elusive jaguar. On a night hike, Jack comes face-to-face with the tapir, a rainforest relative of the rhinoceros.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack to the Future
programme.desc: Today, it’s a two-for-one special, as Jack travels to each location TWICE! Cheetahs, rhinos, manatees, kangaroos and more! Join Jack for time-traveling tour through natural history.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for an adventure with rare and unique animals that all wear white. Arctic wolves, beluga whales, polar bears, white zebras and even an albino alligator!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an unforgettable journey from Borneo to Kuala Lampur! See how conservation work on the front lines is protecting Malaysia's unique and diverse wildlife – like adorable orangutans, slithering snakes and two species of elephants!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen as they immerse themselves with Phinda's rangers who are protecting the reserve's precious population of rhinos and lions!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: Come along for a countdown adventure with the loving moms of the animal kingdom!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's heading to the southern tip of Chile to bring you this adventure. Kicking off this trip in a town that pays serious homage to the famous explorer Magellan, Jack boards a boat for Magdalena Island home to a breeding colony of Magellanic Penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Panama's Bocas del Toro archipelago is home to beautiful beaches and pristine waters, and it's also home to a high concentration of Bats! Jack hikes into a remote cave for an up-close look at the beneficial species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Join him as he visits some of his favorite aquariums and zoological parks, which are on a mission to help save wildlife. Meet sun bears, moose, sea lion pups, a baby rhino, and other wild animals that are all part of new zoo and aquarium programs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they explore Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest encountering wild Chimpanzees, and Colobus Monkeys. They also get lessons from the locals on traditional tea picking and modern beekeeping.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores biomes around the world, and the creatures that live there, like Lions, Black Caiman, Tiger Sharks, Tarantulas, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for all-canine countdown. Meet working dogs on patrol to save rhinos and find lost hikers, get a look at rare populations of African wild dogs, and meet some amazing dogs that provide love and companionship.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Engineers
programme.desc: Today’s featured creatures are some of nature’s greatest engineers and architects. Constructing fortresses from leaves, designing homes with an eye for color, and building cozy bedrooms like you’ve never seen.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi journey to the remote beaches of Santa Rosa National Park in Costa Rica to look for elusive jaguars that prey on nesting sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down six species that turn heads, like moose, elk, Cape Buffalo, proboscis monkeys and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack for his favorite gorilla treks from Rwanda's Virunga Mountains. The Hanna's also visit veterinarians working with the wild gorillas, and a very special orphanage.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Big Bear Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down his coolest bear experiences… trekking the elusive spirit bear in Alaska, helping return a grizzly to his home in Montana, and meeting an adorable baby black bear in New Mexico. Plus 7 more amazing bear experiences.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Cold blooded creatures all need warmth to survive, but they can be found some in some very different habitats. Come along with Jack as he crisscrosses the globe to meet stingrays, giant tortoises, scorpions, thorny devils and more!

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance get into trouble with the Army when they try to help a wounded young soldier who deserted.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas's ranch.

programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.desc: Lucas helps his former Army captain, now an undercover federal agent, infiltrate a gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas finds himself involved in murder when he gallantly steps to the aid of a beautiful woman.

programme.desc: An ex-convict is blamed for a brutal crime despite his claims of rehabilitation.

programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities join forces to restore a bridge that will facilitate communication and trade; someone is gravely injured at the construction site.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick's vision for the future is threatened by a mysterious disappearance that divides the work camp where the communities are building a bridge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick's vision of a civilized future is threatened by a sudden reckoning with past sins that remain unavenged and unforgiven.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick is forced to face the past as he struggles to maintain the safety of the communities and protect the future he and Carl envisioned.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The survivors encounter unfamiliar faces outside the safety of their community's walls and must decide whether or not this new group can be trusted.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol seeks out an old friend living alone in a wilderness teeming with walkers; survivors make the perilous trek to a new home.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A small rescue mission braves a dangerous herd in their hunt for a missing comrade, only to discover a surprising threat that could doom them all.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities thought they could build a better future separately, but the recent loss of one of their own drives them to band together; new leaders rise when a disturbing and dangerous threat is unmasked; an escaped captive revisits his past.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A new arrival at the Hilltop opens up about the leader of a group of mask-wearing savages; a search party sets out on a daring mission to find two missing friends.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The savage group led by Alpha confronts the Hilltop in a harrowing attempt to retrieve her daughter; a supply run for the Kingdom turns into a dangerous quest.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While one community struggles to ease tensions that threaten to divide from within, the true nature of another group comes into focus; a mission to rescue a friend has deadly consequences.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl's daring rescue mission forces Alpha to unleash a group of her own to retrieve what belongs to her, even if the price is paid in blood; the Kingdom's plans to reunite the communities are put in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An outsider's arrival forces Alexandria to rehash devastating old wounds; eye-opening secrets from the past are revealed.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The fair at the Kingdom is underway, with all four communities coming together in celebration for the first time in years; while some pacts are renewed, other deals will come at a much steeper price.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: In the aftermath of an overwhelming loss, the communities must brave a ferocious blizzard; as one group deals with an enemy from within, another is forced to make a life or death decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Advertencia (S6 Ep7)
programme.desc: Las cosas en Alexandria están tranquilas, brevemente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: De principio a fin (S6 Ep8)
programme.desc: Varios problemas se encuentran entre si.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Sin salida (S6 Ep9)
programme.desc: Con "caminantes" dentro de Alexandria, Rick y el grupo están asustados, en desventaja y las cosas solo se ponen más difíciles.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: El mundo por venir (S6 Ep10)
programme.desc: Una misión de recolección sencilla se vuelve complicada cuando el grupo entiende que no son los únicos que quieren un enorme depósito de materiales.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Nudos para desatar (S6 Ep11)
programme.desc: Cuando Rick se da cuenta de que Alexandria no es tan segura como pensaba, se deben tomar decisiones sobre un nuevo rumbo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Aún no es mañana (S6 Ep12)
programme.desc: Rick y en grupo entienden que la única manera de mantener la paz en Alexandria es luchar contra el enemigo nuevo. Pero esta vez el grupo puede estar en desventaja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: El mismo bote (S6 Ep13)
programme.desc: Carol y Maggie deben luchar por sus vidas después de ser capturadas por Los Salvadores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: El doble de lejos (S6 Ep14)
programme.desc: Dos grupos diferentes salen de Alexandria en busca de provisiones. Mientras ambos están ocupados con el futuro de la comunidad, un peligro inminente los desviará.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Este (S6 Ep15)

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, sin quererlo, hace que un grupo de sobrevivientes quede atrapado por los muertos vivientes. Por otra parte, la dinámica grupal va de las acusaciones a la violencia cuando Rick se enfrenta a un enemigo mucho más peligroso que los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick toma la decisión de regresar a Atlanta para recuperar un bolso lleno de armas y salvar la vida de un hombre. Mientras tanto, Lori y Shane deberán lidiar con el sorprendente regreso de alguien a quien creían muerto.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: In order to convince their landlord, Mr. Roper, that there is nothing going on between them and their new male roommate, Chrissy and Janet tell him that Jack is gay.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's visiting mother, not knowing that the girls have rented the spare room to Jack, causes havoc when she decides to spend the night with them.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper feels convinced that his niece will be safe going out with Jack, and Jack would rather be with Janet and Chrissy celebrating Janet's birthday, until he sees the niece.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's fast-talking friend, Larry, gives Jack and the girls a puppy and the kids go to all lengths keeping this from Roper who forbids animals in his building.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has guilt feelings about not standing up to the tough guy who makes a play for Chrissy at the local pub and goes back the next night to tell the Casanova off.

programme.desc: John and Zack help a contractor repair a broken relationship with his daughter Stephanie by giving her the tiny house of her dreams; Stephanie insists she wants to go tiny, but her large shoe collection and shopaholic ways tell a different story.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: Sean and Kate have decided to travel the country and have asked John and Zack to help them create a modern home that sleeps everyone comfortably, including their big furry friends, and is durable enough to take on some miles.
